warnings: Dropped 1 non-scored row(s) worth 0 points (Penalty Points). Check they really aren't scored.
_review.note: Machine-parsed from the official rating sheet. plan.md F3: nobody may be graded against this until a human confirms it.
_review.paraphrase_note: Descriptions and level descriptors are restated in our own words (plan.md §20). Criterion names and every point value are exactly as published on the official rating sheet.

levels.label: Not Demonstrated
levels.descriptor: The participant did not offer an opening statement.

levels.label: Below Expectations
levels.descriptor: The discussion started, but the customer (judge) initiated the interaction.

levels.label: Meets Expectations
levels.descriptor: The participant(s) began the interaction.

levels.label: Exceeds Expectations
levels.descriptor: The participant(s) demonstrated originality in their opening, smoothly moving into identifying customer requirements.

levels.label: Not Demonstrated
levels.descriptor: The participant(s) did not ask any questions to understand requirements.

levels.label: Below Expectations
levels.descriptor: The participant(s) posed questions, but failed to identify precise customer requirements.

levels.label: Meets Expectations
levels.descriptor: The participant(s) employed questions effectively to ascertain the customer's (judge's) requirements.

levels.label: Exceeds Expectations
levels.descriptor: The participant(s) used questions to identify the customer's (judge's) requirements and connected these needs directly to the product or service being offered.

levels.label: Not Demonstrated
levels.descriptor: No offering was introduced.

levels.label: Below Expectations
levels.descriptor: The participant(s) could not generate enthusiasm for the offering or its characteristics.

levels.label: Meets Expectations
levels.descriptor: The participant(s) successfully generated interest in the offering by demonstrating knowledge of its features.

levels.label: Exceeds Expectations
levels.descriptor: The participant(s) successfully transformed desired but non-essential items (wants) into essential items (needs).

levels.label: Not Demonstrated
levels.descriptor: Concerns were neither addressed nor resolved.

levels.label: Below Expectations
levels.descriptor: One concern was successfully resolved.

levels.label: Meets Expectations
levels.descriptor: Between two and three concerns were successfully resolved.

levels.label: Exceeds Expectations
levels.descriptor: All concerns were successfully resolved, leading to a completed transaction.

levels.label: Not Demonstrated
levels.descriptor: No additional items were proposed.

levels.label: Below Expectations
levels.descriptor: Extra items were suggested, but they were not relevant to the main product or service.

levels.label: Meets Expectations
levels.descriptor: Extra items were suggested that were relevant to the main product or service.

levels.label: Exceeds Expectations
levels.descriptor: Extra items were suggested that were relevant to the product or service and enhanced the overall transaction.

levels.label: Not Demonstrated
levels.descriptor: The transaction was not proposed.

levels.label: Below Expectations
levels.descriptor: The participant(s) requested the purchase, but not all concerns had been addressed.

levels.label: Meets Expectations
levels.descriptor: The participant(s) requested the purchase, and there was minimal hesitation from the customer in agreeing.

levels.label: Exceeds Expectations
levels.descriptor: The participant(s) did not need to explicitly ask for the purchase; the presentation itself convinced the customer (judge) to buy.

criteria.name: Demonstrates the ability to develop relationship

levels.label: Not Demonstrated
levels.descriptor: No subsequent contact was mentioned.

levels.label: Below Expectations
levels.descriptor: Ineffective subsequent contact was mentioned.

levels.label: Meets Expectations
levels.descriptor: The transaction was completed, and interest in the product or service was established.

levels.label: Exceeds Expectations
levels.descriptor: A connection was formed, resulting in the customer's (judge's) continued patronage.

criteria.name: Statements are well-organized and clearly stated

levels.label: Not Demonstrated
levels.descriptor: The participant(s) did not seem ready.

levels.label: Below Expectations
levels.descriptor: The participant(s) were prepared, but the flow of information was not logical.

levels.label: Meets Expectations
levels.descriptor: The presentation progressed in a logical order.

levels.label: Exceeds Expectations
levels.descriptor: The presentation progressed in a logical order, and all statements were clearly structured.

criteria.name: Consistently displays confidence, poised body language, engaging eye contact, and effective voice projection.

levels.label: Not Demonstrated
levels.descriptor: None of the listed abilities were demonstrated.

levels.label: Below Expectations
levels.descriptor: One or two of the specified abilities (self-assurance, composed body language, engaging eye contact, or effective voice projection) were demonstrated.

levels.label: Meets Expectations
levels.descriptor: Three of the specified abilities (self-assurance, composed body language, engaging eye contact, or effective voice projection) were demonstrated.

levels.label: Exceeds Expectations
levels.descriptor: All abilities were demonstrated, enhancing the overall delivery.

criteria.name: Demonstrates the ability to effectively answer questions

levels.label: Not Demonstrated
levels.descriptor: The participant(s) were unable to respond to inquiries.

levels.label: Below Expectations
levels.descriptor: The participant(s) did not fully respond to inquiries.

levels.label: Meets Expectations
levels.descriptor: The participant(s) fully responded to inquiries.

levels.label: Exceeds Expectations
levels.descriptor: The participant(s) engaged with the judges while providing complete answers to inquiries.

levels.label: Execution Aligned with Guidelines
levels.descriptor: Only permitted technology devices were used (size specifications were met; a maximum of two, with only one facing judges at a time). The presentation conformed to the assigned topic. Professional boundaries were maintained during setup (no interaction with judges). No materials were left behind after the presentation. Links or QR codes were displayed appropriately (not clicked or scanned by judges). Audio was presented without external speakers (preliminary round). Live animals were not used. Food was not distributed to or left with judges.
